name: Deep Dish Peach Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can sliced peaches in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Drain peaches and measure syrup, adding water if necessary to make 2/3 cup; set syrup mixture aside.
3. Pour peach juice into a 1 quart saucepan and stir together sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon until free of lumps.
4. Whisk in milk and bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring often.
5. When the mixture comes to a simmer and is slightly thickened, pour over peaches and set aside.
6. In a small bowl, stir together baking mix and milk just to blend.
7. Divide into half and spoon over peaches to make 2 drop biscuits.
8. Bake for 20 minutes, or until topping is browned and peaches are bubbling.
9. Serve warm or cold with frozen vanilla yogurt if desired.
Makes 2 servings
Per serving Calories: 257 Protein: 3 grams Fat: 3 grams Cholesterol: 1 mg Carbohydrate: 73 grams Sodium: 256 mg Exchanges: 3 fruit, 1/2 bread
